---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the schema or template doesn't work as documented
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened?

A clear description of the bug. Which workflow / template / example file?

## What did you expect?

What the docs (`CLAUDE.md`, README, SETUP, System Reference) led you to expect.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Cloned the template
2. Ran `claude` in the vault folder
3. Typed `[command]`
4. Got `[result]`

## Environment

- Obsidian version:
- Claude Code version (`claude --version`):
- OS:
- Did you remove the demo content (`find . -name "*(demo).md" -delete`) before reproducing? yes / no

## Anything else?

Relevant transcript snippets, lint output, screenshots.
